msg: Explore-agent finding 'check-reservations is dead code, delete it' was wrong — code-scope extends the same registry (scalar vs path-list claims); verified before acting and wired it into Gate 4.5 instead of deleting M9 work
Traversal guard changed a fixture contract: hostile slug used to exit 0 with empty result, now exits 2 loud — fixture comment already permitted rejection, only the assert_rc pinned the old behavior

New checklist check #9 exposed that the major-missing-stories fixture had silently broken FR coverage (FR-002 absent from plan) — invisible to the suite before the merge; exactly the class the merge exists to catch
Assumed usage errors exit 2; CLI convention is exit 1 for user/usage, 2 for internal — set-size fixture expectation corrected after first red run
